title: Ubiquiti UniFi UNAS-Pro
description: A NAS device for 2U rack mounting with 7 x 2.5"/3.5" drive bays , one GbE RJ-45 port, and one 10G SFP+ port for uplink. Ideal for storing large files. Powered by a quad-core ARM Cortex-A57 processor running at 1.7 GHz , complemented by 8 GB of RAM (1) 10G SFP+ uplink and (1) GbE RJ-45 port Data protection with RAID storage technology Backup power readiness for UniFi 1.3" touch display for management Bluetooth 4.1 support Maximum power consumption of 135 W Device Power cable Rack-mounting accessories
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces Number of HDD slots 7 LAN speed (1) 10/100/1000Mbps Gigabit LAN Yes Optical interfaces (1) 1/10Gbps Other features Touchscreen, Bluetooth Power Power type Mains power (230V), UniFi SmartPower RPS Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 160 Power via connector/terminal 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Rackmount Material Zinc, Steel "U" positions 2 Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 40 Weight [kg] 9,5 Width [mm] 442 Height [mm] 87 Depth [mm] 325 Hardware Supported HDD capacity [TB] 16 CPU ARM Cortex-A57
